# Demand Signals

> Demand Signals is an AI-powered demand generation agency based in Northern California. We build AI-powered websites and run AI-driven marketing operations for local businesses. Our AI systems continuously optimize websites, produce content, manage social media, and respond to reviews — 24/7. We have built and shipped 14+ client sites across every industry. Founded by a 30-year veteran in web development and digital marketing.

## Websites & Apps
- [WordPress Sites](https://demandsignals.co/websites-apps/wordpress-development): AI-managed WordPress sites for local search, GEO citations, and lead generation.
- [React / Next.js Apps](https://demandsignals.co/websites-apps/react-next-webapps): Full-stack web apps with AI features, TypeScript, Supabase, Vercel edge deployment.
- [iOS & Android Apps](https://demandsignals.co/websites-apps/mobile-apps): Cross-platform mobile apps with React Native.
- [Vibe Coded Web Apps](https://demandsignals.co/websites-apps/vibe-coded): AI-built web apps shipped in days using Cursor and Claude Code.
- [UI/UX Design](https://demandsignals.co/websites-apps/design): Figma design systems and AI-assisted prototyping.
- [Agent & App Hosting](https://demandsignals.co/websites-apps/hosting): Managed hosting on Vercel, Cloudflare, and DSIG.

## Demand Generation
- [LLM Optimization](https://demandsignals.co/demand-generation/geo-aeo-llm-optimization): Get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini. GEO, AEO, llms.txt optimization.
- [Local SEO](https://demandsignals.co/demand-generation/local-seo): AI-powered local search optimization with longtail targeting and citation building.
- [Geo-Targeting](https://demandsignals.co/demand-generation/geo-targeting): Programmatic city × service pages for your service territory.
- [Google Business Admin](https://demandsignals.co/demand-generation/gbp-admin): Full GBP management — posts, photos, Q&A, reviews, attributes.
- [Demand Gen Systems](https://demandsignals.co/demand-generation/systems): Automated pipelines with AI monitoring, content creation, and lead routing.

## Content & Social
- [AI Content Generation](https://demandsignals.co/content-social/ai-content-generation): GEO-first content for search and AI citation.
- [AI Social Media](https://demandsignals.co/content-social/ai-social-media-management): Automated multi-platform posting, 5-7 per week.
- [AI Review Responders](https://demandsignals.co/content-social/ai-review-auto-responders): Every review handled within hours, automatically.
- [AI Auto Blogging](https://demandsignals.co/content-social/ai-auto-blogging): Weekly blog content targeting buyer search terms.
- [AI Content Republishing](https://demandsignals.co/content-social/ai-content-repurposing): Repurpose content across 5-10 channels.

## AI & Agent Services
- [AI Adoption Strategies](https://demandsignals.co/ai-services/ai-automation-strategies): Custom AI roadmaps with ROI analysis.
- [AI Workforce Automation](https://demandsignals.co/ai-services/ai-workforce-automation): Replace manual roles with AI systems.
- [AI Infrastructure](https://demandsignals.co/ai-services/ai-agent-infrastructure): Database, API, pipeline, and monitoring architecture.
- [AI Powered Outreach](https://demandsignals.co/ai-services/ai-automated-outreach): Personalized prospecting at scale.
- [AI Agent Swarms](https://demandsignals.co/ai-services/ai-agent-swarms): Autonomous agent networks running 24/7.
- [AI Private LLMs](https://demandsignals.co/ai-services/private-llms): Self-hosted models for sensitive data.
- [AI Clawbot Setup](https://demandsignals.co/ai-services/clawbot-setup): Intelligent crawlers for competitive intelligence.
